product_overview: Auraly is an audio learning app focusing on memo creation and playback from shared multimedia content. The main goals of this testing project are to ensure comprehensive end-to-end functionality including share extension handling, memo management, audio playback, and user interface flows across multiple platforms.
core_goals: Validate full end-to-end app functionality across all features and flows
Ensure reliable share extension processing from supported platforms (Instagram, YouTube, TikTok)
Verify audio player features including speed control and playback stability
Confirm smooth UI performance and responsiveness under normal and edge case conditions
Identify and document any bugs or performance issues for resolution
key_features: Share Extension Processing supporting multiple platforms with memo creation and navigation
Detailed Memo View displaying summary, transcript, vocabulary, grammar and conjugations
Sticky Audio Player with speed control cycling through 0.75x, 1.0x, and 1.5x speeds and progress tracking
Home Screen with memo list, filtering by platform, and memo navigation
Import Flow for language selection after sharing content
Flashcards with swipe and flip animations to reinforce learning
Quiz feature with completion confetti and score calculation
user_flow_summary: Onboarding Flow from fresh install through landing, quiz, pitch, tutorial, and completion
Share Flow from content sharing on external apps into Auraly with language selection and memo processing
Home Screen interaction including memo browsing, filtering, and navigation to memo details
Memo Detail Screen usage with tab navigation across content types and audio playback controls
Flashcards exploration starting from memo details with swipe and flip interactions
Quiz participation from memo with question answering and final scoring
validation_criteria: Successful memo creation and accurate platform recognition from share intents
Audio playback functionality with responsive play, pause, speed change, and scrubbing
UI responsiveness maintaining 60fps smoothness during scrolling and animations
Correct filter function behavior and platform icon display in memo lists
Persistence of onboarding completion and memo data across app restarts
Graceful error handling for unsupported share sources and network outages
Performance metrics including launch time under 3 seconds and memory usage below 150MB
Comprehensive coverage by automated tests plus extensive manual validation on physical devices for share functionality

features.name: Share Extension Processing
features.description: Handles incoming share intents, determines platform, saves memo to global state, and navigates to detail screen.

features.name: Memo Detail View
features.description: Displays detailed content of a memo including summary, transcript, vocabulary, grammar, and conjugations.

features.name: Import Flow
features.description: UI for selecting language after sharing content.

features.name: Audio Player
features.description: Sticky audio player with speed controls.

features.name: Home Screen
features.description: Lists recent memos and allows filtering.
